name: COMPANIES_BY_TARGETPAIR
description: Given a TargetPair, list assignees with their first publication year and patent counts.
cypher:
MATCH (tp:TargetPair {name:$tp_name})<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
RETURN a.name AS company, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY first_year ASC, patent_count DESC
LIMIT 50;

examples: Which companies have filed patents on PD-1×VEGFA bispecific antibodies?
